rationale.R1.5: Proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors (trimming bounds, retained fraction, clustered SEs are illustrative defaults) which could potentially lead to harm if not verified.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
